goal: Forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay: verify reproducibility, detect leakage, confirm same-window improvement, and deliver a final CONFIRMED / DOWNGRADED / REJECTED verdict.
global_constraints: Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify or re-tune the base.
No new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes allowed.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate independent runs — never aggregated.
Rule-based (threshold / bucket) overlay must be validated before any model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE verdict only after every forensic block passes; any confirmed leakage triggers REJECTED.
No mixing of reproduction checks, leakage checks, and new ideas in the same run.

slices.title: Freeze и постановка forensic-cycle
slices.hypothesis: Open dedicated audit project, freeze immutable reference, and register all open forensic items.
slices.objective: Open dedicated audit project, freeze immutable reference, and register all open forensic items.
success_criteria: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with frozen reference and complete open-items register.
evidence_requirements: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with frozen reference and complete open-items register.

slices.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
slices.hypothesis: Reproduce the full v10 pipeline — dataset, features, baselines, veto models, overlay snapshot, lockbox result — without any manual corrections.
slices.objective: Reproduce the full v10 pipeline — dataset, features, baselines, veto models, overlay snapshot, lockbox result — without any manual corrections.
success_criteria: Verdict recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.
evidence_requirements: Verdict recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.

slices.title: Reference integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Resolve the @1 vs @3 baseline contradiction found in v10 lockbox table.
slices.objective: Resolve the @1 vs @3 baseline contradiction found in v10 lockbox table.
success_criteria: Clear verdict recorded: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented differences.
evidence_requirements: Clear verdict recorded: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented differences.
